summary: Tested 22+ backend endpoints for GymBuddy. All endpoints functional. Initial onboarding failure was due to test payload schema mismatch (used 'experience_level'/'workout_days_per_week'/'available_equipment'/'workout_location_absent' instead of backend's 'fitness_level'/'workouts_per_week'/'equipment'/'workout_location'). After using correct onboarding schema, workout-plan, diet-plan, and their regenerate endpoints all return 200 with valid data. Sessions, progress (weight/measurements/photos/strength/consistency), file serving with ?auth=, meals, coach AI, dashboard all work. Auth 401 negative checks pass.
passed: POST /api/onboarding (with correct schema: fitness_level, workouts_per_week, workout_location, equipment, diet_preference)
POST /api/food-scan (200 with all required keys; AI returned 'Unknown' for 1x1 test PNG which is expected)

schema_note.area: Onboarding schema mismatch with review request payload
schema_note.details: Review request specified field names like 'experience_level', 'workout_days_per_week', 'dietary_restrictions', 'available_equipment', 'target_weight_kg' but backend OnboardingIn model (server.py:130) requires 'fitness_level', 'workouts_per_week', 'workout_location', 'equipment', 'diet_preference', 'target_calories', 'medical_notes'. Backend rejects with 422. This is a documentation/contract mismatch, not a backend bug. Frontend likely sends the correct schema. Main agent should confirm frontend onboarding form aligns with backend schema.

action_items: No backend fixes required. Confirm frontend onboarding form uses backend schema (fitness_level, workouts_per_week, workout_location, equipment, diet_preference) and not the alternative names listed in the review request.

success_rate.backend: 100% (26/26 endpoints after using correct onboarding schema)
